criteria.label: Explain Promise states and how await/then read them.
criteria.example: A Promise is `pending` → `fulfilled(value)` or `rejected(reason)`. `await p` unwraps a fulfilled value or throws the rejection. `.then(onFulfil, onReject)` is the callback equivalent.

criteria.label: Write async functions with try/catch error handling.
Choose sequential vs parallel and use Promise.all correctly.
Apply race/allSettled/any for timeouts, resilience and first-success.
